idea-plugin.name: Secretbank
idea-plugin.description:
Secretbank — secrets manager that understands your dependency graph

Read and reveal credentials from your local Secretbank directly inside IntelliJ IDEA / WebStorm / GoLand / PyCharm / Rider / RubyMine, and scan your project's dependencies for known secret-leak / supply-chain advisories from OSV.dev.

  • Tools → Secretbank → List credentials — quick view, no values.
  • Tools → Secretbank → Reveal credential — passphrase prompt → clipboard, auto-cleared in 30s.
  • Tools → Secretbank → Scan supply-chain risk — flags risky deps in package.json / Cargo.toml as inspection warnings.
  • Status bar shield icon for at-a-glance access.

Requires the secretbank CLI on your PATH. Get it at secretbank.app/download. Plugin is AGPL-3.0; the desktop app is too.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0

  • Tool Window (right side) with Credentials / Supply chain / Graph / Settings tabs.
  • Graph tab with JCEF-rendered dependency graph (Issuer → Credential → Project → Deployment). Pan / zoom / click / double-click / right-click. Right-click opens a kind-aware context menu: Show blast radius for credentials (BFS-bucketed downstream nodes coloured red→orange→yellow), Reveal, Open docs/repo/URL, Focus, Copy ID. Keyboard: Ctrl+F search, Esc clear, Ctrl+0 fit. No external CDN.
  • Auto-scan on project open (opt-in via Settings tab).
  • Status-bar widget, Tools menu actions, manifest inspections (package.json / Cargo.toml / requirements.txt / go.mod patterns).
  • Backed by the local secretbank CLI — list / reveal / scan / graph subcommands.

action.description: Reveal a credential value to the clipboard.
Run a supply-chain scan on the current project.
